summary: iter256 avatar bug fixes verified - All 12 backend tests pass, frontend profile switching and avatar display working correctly. William's three reported issues are fixed: (1) Avatar pill now positioned at top:80px below OVERDUE banner, (2) Profile dropdown shows real avatar photos from Builder.io CDN, (3) Director profile is visible and clickable with correct id/user_id fields.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /profiles endpoint correctly returns both 'id' and 'user_id' fields for each profile
Picture field rotation (Echo_B/F/M/R) working correctly - director_user gets Echo_B
Profiles sorted correctly: admin at index 0, director at index 1
switch-profile endpoint has fallback lookup for user_id field (line 403-404)
Frontend UserAvatarMenu.tsx correctly positioned at top:80px to clear OVERDUE banner
Profile dropdown renders real avatar images from Builder.io CDN, not just initials

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all avatar and profile switching features working)

test_credentials: devAuth=1 query param for dev mode access
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter256 fixed William's avatar bug. Key fixes: (1) /profiles returns both id and user_id fields, (2) Avatar pill at top:80px clears OVERDUE banner, (3) Profile dropdown shows real Echo avatar photos. All 14 profiles visible in dropdown with Builder.io CDN images.

backend: GET /api/auth/jwt/profiles returns 14 cleaned rows (test users filtered)
Each profile row has BOTH id and user_id fields
Each profile has picture field set to Echo_B/F/M/R
director_user has id='director_user', name='William Reyes', role='director', picture='Echo_B'
Profiles sorted: admin at index 0, director at index 1
switch-profile fallback lookup works for user_id field
GET /api/auth/jwt/me?devAuth=1 with X-Dev-User-Id: director_user returns role='director'
frontend: Avatar pill renders at fixed position top:80px right:16px (BELOW OVERDUE banner)
topbar-avatar-img present with Builder.io CDN URL (Echo avatar)
Avatar dropdown opens with 14 profile buttons
switch-profile-img-director_user image present with Builder.io CDN URL

All 14 profiles visible: admin, director_user, general_manager_user, executive_chef_user, pastry_chef_user, fb_director_user, controller_user, sous_chef_user, spa_manager_user, dining_room_manager_user, dir_engineering_user, purchasing_manager_user, events_manager_user, demo-hourly-001
Profile switch to director_user → avatar pill shows 'William Reyes DIRECTOR'
Approval banner renders with readable contrast
Oracle dashboard in Purchasing & Receiving renders with KPI tiles (Total Spend, Open Approvals, Active Vendors, Tracked SKUs)
